name: TDEE Calculator
seo_description: Use our free tdee calculator to quickly estimate tdee, bmr based on weight, height, age. Not registration needed.
example_label: Calculate TDEE for 75kg, 175cm, 30 years, male, moderate exercise.
result_context: The TDEE is calories to mantener weight current; reduces 500 kcal/day to perder ~0.5kg/week.
formula_display: BMR (Mifflin) → TDEE = BMR × factor actividad (1.2 a 1.9)
steps: Enter weight, height, edad and género
Select nivel of actividad of the lista
Calculate BMR with formula Mifflin-St Jeor
Multiply BMR per factor of actividad to TDEE
mistakes: Sobreestimar nivel of actividad (The majority is more sedentario of lo that cree)
Not register cambios of weight semanalmente (ajustar TDEE if not change)
Seguir TDEE ciegamente without escuchar signals of hambre/saciedad
desc: Free online tdee calculator. Enter weight and height to get instant results.
